bool canWin(int mask) {
   if (sum of mask >= desiredTotal) return true;
   if (memo contains mask) return memo[mask];
   bool canWin = false;

         if (!canWin(new_mask)) {
             canWin = true;
             break;
         }
   }
   memo[mask] = canWin;
   return canWin;
}

In code:

bool canIWin(int maxChoosableInteger, int desiredTotal) {

   int total_sum = maxChoosableInteger * (maxChoosableInteger + 1) / 2;

   if (total_sum < desiredTotal) return false;

   if (desiredTotal == 0) return true; // according to example 2.

   unordered_map<int, bool> memo;

   function<bool(int)> dfs = [&](int mask) {

       // check memo

       if (memo.find(mask) != memo.end()) return memo[mask];

       // compute current_sum for mask

       int current_sum = 0;

       for (int j=1; j <= maxChoosableInteger; ++j) {

           if (mask & (1 << (j-1))) {

               current_sum += j;

           }

       }

       // check for immediate win

       for (int i=1; i <= maxChoosableInteger; ++i) {

           if ( (mask & (1 << (i-1))) == 0 ) {

               if (current_sum + i >= desiredTotal) {

                   return memo[mask] = true;

               }

           }

       }

       // check for next moves

       for (int i=1; i <= maxChoosableInteger; ++i) {

           if ( (mask & (1 << (i-1))) == 0 ) {

               int new_mask = mask | (1 << (i-1));

               if ( !dfs(new_mask) ) {

                   return memo[mask] = true;

               }

           }

       }

       return memo[mask] = false;

   };

   return dfs(0);

}

But in C++, the code for canIWin would be:

class Solution {
public:
    bool canIWin(int maxChoosableInteger, int desiredTotal) {
        int total_sum = maxChoosableInteger * (maxChoosableInteger + 1) / 2;
        if (total_sum < desiredTotal) {
            return false;
        }
        if (desiredTotal == 0) {
            return true;
        }
        unordered_map<int, bool> memo;
        function<bool(int)> dfs = [&](int mask) {
            if (memo.find(mask) != memo.end()) {
                return memo[mask];
            }
            // Compute current_sum for mask
            int current_sum = 0;
            for (int j = 1; j <= maxChoosableInteger; ++j) {
                if (mask & (1 << (j - 1))) {
                    current_sum += j;
                }
            }
            // Check for immediate win
            for (int i = 1; i <= maxChoosableInteger; ++i) {
                if ( (mask & (1 << (i - 1))) == 0 ) {
                    if (current_sum + i >= desiredTotal) {
                        return memo[mask] = true;
                    }
                }
            }
            // Check for next moves
            for (int i = 1; i <= maxChoosableInteger; ++i) {
                if ( (mask & (1 << (i - 1))) == 0 ) {
                    int new_mask = mask | (1 << (i - 1));
                    if ( !dfs(new_mask) ) {
                        return memo[mask] = true;
                    }
                }
            }
            return memo[mask] = false;
        };
        return dfs(0);
    }
};

}

bool canIWin(int maxChoosableInteger, int desiredTotal) {

   int total_sum = maxChoosableInteger * (maxChoosableInteger + 1) / 2;

   if (total_sum < desiredTotal) return false;

   if (desiredTotal == 0) return true; // according to example 2.

   unordered_map<int, bool> memo;

   function<bool(int)> dfs = [&](int mask) {

       // check memo

       if (memo.find(mask) != memo.end()) return memo[mask];

       // compute current_sum for mask

       int current_sum = 0;

       for (int j=1; j <= maxChoosableInteger; ++j) {

           if (mask & (1 << (j-1))) {

               current_sum += j;

           }

       }

       // check for immediate win

       for (int i=1; i <= maxChoosableInteger; ++i) {

           if ( (mask & (1 << (i-1))) == 0 ) {

               if (current_sum + i >= desiredTotal) {

                   return memo[mask] = true;

               }

           }

       }

       // check for next moves

       for (int i=1; i <= maxChoosableInteger; ++i) {

           if ( (mask & (1 << (i-1))) == 0 ) {

               int new_mask = mask | (1 << (i-1));

               if ( !dfs(new_mask) ) {

                   return memo[mask] = true;

               }

           }

       }

       return memo[mask] = false;

   };

   return dfs(0);

}
